channel.title: 0xd1s - Security Research Blog
channel.description: Security research, exploit development, and technical write-ups covering various aspects of offensive security and penetration testing.

item.title: HackTheBox - Soulmate
item.description: Soulmate is an easy difficulty Linux machine that showcases exploitation of an authentication bypass vulnerability in CrushFTP, allowing players to access an admin user account. By uploading a malicious PHP file to the application's web root, remote command execution is achieved. For privilege escalation, another remote command execution vulnerability in the Erlang/OTP SSH server is exploited to gain root access.

item.title: Welcome to the Blog
item.description: How this blog is built, and how to publish your own write-ups by creating a folder with a markdown file and its images.
